description: Schengen Cascade Visa Regime categories for Indian nationals under the 2026 India-EU Mobility Pact.

cascade_tiers.name: Standard Short-Stay
eligibility_criteria: First-time Schengen applicant or no prior visa history
Standard documentation: invitation, hotel booking, travel insurance
Proof of financial means (€65-120/day depending on country)

cascade_tiers.name: Enhanced Multi-Entry
eligibility_criteria: At least 2 prior Schengen visas used lawfully within 3 years
Stable employment or business in India
Clean travel record with timely departures

cascade_tiers.name: Premium Long-Term
eligibility_criteria: Previously held and lawfully used a 2-year multi-entry Schengen visa
Strong travel record across multiple Schengen states
Demonstrated ties to India (property, employment, family)
No immigration violations of any kind

special_categories.name: EU Blue Card Holder Dependents
special_categories.description: Spouse and minor children of Indian EU Blue Card holders get expedited multi-entry visa processing.
special_categories.validity: matches Blue Card holder visa validity

special_categories.name: Business Travelers (BTIA Track)
special_categories.description: Professionals covered under Bilateral Trade and Investment Agreement get streamlined processing.

special_categories.name: Academic & Research Visa
special_categories.description: Researchers and academics collaborating with EU institutions under Horizon Europe framework.

required_documents: Valid Indian passport with 2+ blank pages
